metadata.name: folder2prompt-cli
metadata.summary: A CLI tool to convert files in a directory to a text output.

functions.name: folder2prompt_cli.main.is_ignored
documentation: Checks if a filepath should be ignored based on gitignore-style rules.

functions.name: folder2prompt_cli.main.get_file_contents
documentation: Reads and returns the content of a text file.

functions.name: folder2prompt_cli.main.format_repo_contents
documentation: Formats the content of files into a structured string including a directory tree.

functions.name: folder2prompt_cli.main.process_directory
documentation: Processes all files in the given directory and its subdirectories.
